ops.title: gh run list --commit silently returns nothing for a short sha — pass the full 40-char sha
ops.body: `gh run list --commit <sha>` matches only the full 40-character sha; a short sha (e.g. 12 chars) returns an empty list with exit 0, which makes watch-CI retry loops conclude "no run registered" even when runs exist and are green. This repo's AGENTS.md watch-CI idiom depends on this — always `git rev-parse` the full sha first. Related: [[jj-concurrent-session-sibling-recovery]].
